positive: A stylized, whimsical nocturnal cityscape view, featuring exaggerated bioluminescent flora and fauna integrated into the architecture. The central subject is a gentle, glowing crescent moon partially obscured by stylized floating lanterns and soft cosmic dust. The style is highly detailed, reminiscent of Art Nouveau mixed with contemporary digital graphic art. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes against a deep indigo and midnight blue background, highlighted by neon cyan, vibrant emerald green, and soft gold accents. Excellent contrast is key. Composition must be balanced and radial, perfectly suited for centered apparel printing. The composition should evoke wonder and tranquility. Cinematic lighting, perfect symmetry, high definition, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, abstract, messy, extra limbs, fused fingers, low detail, noise, copyright
